requirement_topic.en: MTIT / TPSA Mandatory Radio Type Approval

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain mandatory type approval from the Ministry of Telecommunications and Information Technology (وزارة الاتصالات وتقنية المعلومات — MTIT) and its subordinate Telecom and Posts & Savings Authority (TPSA) before import or sale in Yemen. MTIT is the national regulatory authority for telecommunications and spectrum management. The type approval certificate must accompany each import shipment, and the approval number must appear on the device label and packaging. Test reports from a recognised laboratory to ITU-referenced or internationally accepted EMC and radio standards are required as part of the application dossier. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, and SRRC certificates are not formally recognised as substitutes. Important: Yemen has been in active armed conflict since 2015. MTIT administrative operations are formally seated in Aden under the internationally recognized government (IRG); TPSA functions may be significantly limited or split between IRG-controlled (south/Aden) and Houthi-controlled (north/Sanaa) areas. Enforcement capacity is materially reduced in many regions. In practice, a large volume of Chinese wireless equipment enters through informal trade channels. Formal type approval may be aspirational under current conflict conditions, but compliance obligations remain in force under the recognised legal framework.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须在进口或于也门销售前，取得电信和信息技术部（وزارة الاتصالات وتقنية المعلومات — MTIT）及其下属电信和邮政储蓄局（TPSA）的强制型号认证。MTIT是负责电信及频谱管理的国家监管机构。型号认证证书须随每批进口货物附上，设备标签和包装须标注认证编号。申请文件须包含经认可实验室依据ITU参考或国际公认EMC和无线电标准出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID及SRRC证书不被正式接受为替代。重要提示：也门自2015年起处于持续武装冲突中。MTIT行政职能正式设于亚丁，归属国际认可政府（IRG）；TPSA职能在IRG控制区（南部/亚丁）和胡塞控制区（北部/萨那）之间可能严重受限或分裂。许多地区的执法能力大幅削弱。实际上，大量中国无线设备通过非正式贸易渠道进入也门。在当前冲突条件下，正式型号认证可能较难实现，但合规义务在已认可的法律框架下仍然有效。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須在進口或於葉門銷售前，取得電信和資訊技術部（وزارة الاتصالات وتقنية المعلومات — MTIT）及其下屬電信和郵政儲蓄局（TPSA）的強制型號認證。MTIT是負責電信及頻譜管理的國家監管機構。型號認證證書須隨每批進口貨物附上，設備標籤和包裝須標注認證編號。申請文件須包含經認可實驗室依據ITU參考或國際公認EMC和無線電標準出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID及SRRC證書不被正式接受為替代。重要提示：葉門自2015年起處於持續武裝衝突中。MTIT行政職能正式設於亞丁，歸屬國際認可政府（IRG）；TPSA職能在IRG控制區（南部/亞丁）和胡塞控制區（北部/薩那）之間可能嚴重受限或分裂。許多地區的執法能力大幅削弱。實際上，大量中國無線設備透過非正式貿易渠道進入葉門。在當前衝突條件下，正式型號認證可能較難實現，但合規義務在已認可的法律框架下仍然有效。

standards_or_laws: Yemen Telecommunications Law No. 37 of 1991 (as amended)
MTIT / TPSA type approval regulations and procedures
ITU-R Radio Regulations (spectrum and technical parameters)
YSMO (Yemeni Standards, Metrology and Quality Control Organization) national standards references

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue. These Chinese approvals establish the baseline but are not recognised by Yemen MTIT/TPSA.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。上述中国批准构成基线，但不被也门MTIT/TPSA承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。上述中國批准構成基線，但不被葉門MTIT/TPSA承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: MTIT/TPSA type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by Yemen MTIT/TPSA. 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth are generally permitted under ITU-aligned spectrum management; 5 GHz WLAN sub-band permissions should be confirmed with MTIT before product launch. A fresh MTIT/TPSA application with test reports and approval number on label and packaging is required for every model. Due to the conflict-split regulatory environment, import and enforcement procedures may differ materially between Houthi-controlled and IRG-controlled areas; exporters must additionally conduct UN/US/EU sanctions due diligence before engaging any Houthi-linked entity, port, or counterparty.
gap.zh: MTIT/TPSA型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。SRRC批准和CCC认证均不被也门MTIT/TPSA承认。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi和蓝牙在符合ITU的频谱管理框架下通常获准使用；5 GHz WLAN子频段许可应在产品上市前向MTIT确认。每款产品均须重新进行MTIT/TPSA申请，并在标签和包装上标注测试报告及认证编号。由于冲突分裂的监管环境，进口和执法程序在胡塞控制区和IRG控制区之间可能存在重大差异；出口商在与任何胡塞相关实体、港口或交易对手接触前，还须进行联合国/美国/欧盟制裁合规尽职调查。
gap.zht: MTIT/TPSA型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。SRRC批准和CCC認證均不被葉門MTIT/TPSA承認。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi和藍牙在符合ITU的頻譜管理框架下通常獲准使用；5 GHz WLAN子頻段許可應在產品上市前向MTIT確認。每款產品均須重新進行MTIT/TPSA申請，並在標籤和包裝上標注測試報告及認證編號。由於衝突分裂的監管環境，進口和執法程序在胡塞控制區和IRG控制區之間可能存在重大差異；出口商在與任何胡塞相關實體、港口或交易對手接觸前，還須進行聯合國/美國/歐盟制裁合規盡職調查。

source.publisher: MTIT — Ministry of Telecommunications and Information Technology, Republic of Yemen (وزارة الاتصالات وتقنية المعلومات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] MTIT/TPSA type approval is mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Yemen under the recognised legal framework. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. Conflict-divided regulatory enforcement and UN/US/EU sanctions require independent due diligence before any Yemen export engagement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在已认可的法律框架下，MTIT/TPSA型号认证对所有在也门进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。冲突分裂的监管执法状况及联合国/美国/欧盟制裁要求在任何也门出口接触前进行独立尽职调查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在已認可的法律框架下，MTIT/TPSA型號認證對所有在葉門進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。衝突分裂的監管執法狀況及聯合國/美國/歐盟制裁要求在任何葉門出口接觸前進行獨立盡職調查。
